title: trifolium lenkoranicum
intro: Trifolium lenkoranicum, also known as Lenkoran clover, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family that is native to the Caucasus region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trifolium lenkoranicum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Trifolium lenkoranicum can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are typically used to treat various health conditions, including fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
